cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out the answer to this question. So the question is, today is September 7th (9/7), and Jane is watching NFL 2003. We need to find out what the date was a month ago in MM/DD/YYYY format. The options are A to F. First, let me make sure I understand the question correctly. If today is September 7, 2003, then a month ago would be August 7, 2003, right? Because subtracting one month from September would take us to August. So the date would be 08/07/2003. Let me look at the options. Option F is 08/07/2003. So that should be the correct answer. But wait, let me check again to make sure I haven't missed anything. Let me think about how months work. September has 30 days. If we go back one month from September 7, that would be August 7. Because August has 31 days, but we are just subtracting a month, not 30 days. So the day of the month stays the same if possible. So August 7 is correct. So the answer is F. But let me check the other options just in case. Option A is 08/14/2003. That's August 14th, which is a week
